name: File Manager
description: High-performance file explorer to manage server directories and files.
changelog_en: v1.0.11: Desktop UI layout: shared NAS/ADM chrome sidebars, soft launcher wallpaper, System Monitor 2x2 gauges, App Store featured banner + install card grid. v1.0.10: Fix zip extract — Windows backslash paths become real folders; zip-slip guard. Context menu delete/cut/copy applies to full multi-selection. v1.0.9: Desktop shell integration.
changelog_vi: v1.0.11: Bo cuc Desktop UI: sidebar chrome kieu NAS/ADM, wallpaper launcher, System Monitor gauge 2x2, App Store banner + luoi the Install. v1.0.10: Sua giai nen zip — duong dan backslash Windows thanh thu muc that; chong zip-slip. Menu chuot phai xoa/cat/sao chep ap dung cho toan bo da chon. v1.0.9: Tich hop Desktop shell.

name: Web Manager
description: Nginx and Apache vhosts, LEMP/LAMP stack bootstrap, PHP versions/extensions/php.ini, PHP-FPM overview, and smart DB admin tools.
changelog_en: v1.2.2: Desktop UI layout: shared NAS/ADM chrome sidebars, soft launcher wallpaper, System Monitor 2x2 gauges, App Store featured banner + install card grid. v1.2.1: Fix PHP version detection — probe FPM sockets/systemd units and resolve binaries via /usr/bin when service PATH is minimal; PHP Manager no longer shows all versions as uninstalled. v1.2.0: PHP Manager merged into Web Manager sidebar tab.
changelog_vi: v1.2.2: Bo cuc Desktop UI: sidebar chrome kieu NAS/ADM, wallpaper launcher, System Monitor gauge 2x2, App Store banner + luoi the Install. v1.2.1: Sua nhan dien phien ban PHP — quet socket FPM/systemd va tim binary qua /usr/bin khi PATH service hep; PHP Manager khong con hien tat ca la chua cai. v1.2.0: Gop PHP Manager vao tab Web Manager.

name: Site Wizard
description: 1-click website provisioning: Nginx vhost, LEMP stack, WordPress/Laravel deploy, MySQL, and SSL.
changelog_en: v1.1.5: Stabilize WordPress 1-click — WP-CLI/php install with status files, soft-fail DB bootstrap (site still usable via /wp-admin/install.php), reuse existing nginx vhost on re-run, clearer errors. v1.1.4: Fix WordPress CLI install — seed HTTP_HOST/SERVER_NAME and WP_HOME before wp_install (fixes Undefined array key HTTP_HOST on PHP 8). v1.1.3: Fix WordPress database connection on install — sync MySQL password on re-provision, grant user for localhost and 127.0.0.1, verify connectivity and pick working DB_HOST, escape credentials in wp-config. v1.1.2: Fix 1-click WordPress provisioning — initialize database via wp_install when core files already exist; sync wp-config credentials on re-provision; SSL failure no longer aborts the job (warnings shown); proper HTTPS reachability check. v1.1.1: Desktop UI layout.
changelog_vi: v1.1.5: On dinh cai 1-click WordPress — WP-CLI/php voi file status, soft-fail neu DB bootstrap loi (van dung duoc qua /wp-admin/install.php), tai su dung nginx vhost khi chay lai, bao loi ro hon. v1.1.4: Sua cai WordPress qua CLI — gan HTTP_HOST/SERVER_NAME va WP_HOME truoc wp_install (sua loi Undefined array key HTTP_HOST tren PHP 8). v1.1.3: Sua loi ket noi database WordPress khi cai — dong bo mat khau MySQL khi provision lai, cap quyen cho localhost va 127.0.0.1, kiem tra ket noi va chon DB_HOST phu hop, escape credential trong wp-config. v1.1.2: Sua cai 1-click WordPress — khoi tao DB qua wp_install; dong bo wp-config; loi SSL khong dung job; kiem tra HTTPS dung. v1.1.1: Bo cuc Desktop UI.

name: Database Manager
description: MySQL/MariaDB management and user creation.
changelog_en: v1.0.8: Fix create_user on re-provision — always ALTER USER password and grant for both localhost and 127.0.0.1 (fixes WordPress Site Wizard DB connection errors). v1.0.7: Desktop UI sidebar shell redesign — engine sidebar (MySQL/Postgres), Databases/Users tabs, flex scroll layout, WindowModal confirmations, en/vi i18n. One ZIP for Classic and Desktop.
changelog_vi: v1.0.8: Sua create_user khi provision lai — luon ALTER USER mat khau va cap quyen cho localhost va 127.0.0.1 (sua loi ket noi DB WordPress Site Wizard). v1.0.7: Thiet ke lai giao dien Desktop sidebar — chon engine, tab Databases/Users, layout flex scroll, WindowModal, i18n en/vi. Mot ZIP cho Classic va Desktop.

name: Docker Manager
description: Manage containers, images, and stacks seamlessly.
changelog_en: v1.0.13: Desktop UI layout: shared NAS/ADM chrome sidebars, soft launcher wallpaper, System Monitor 2x2 gauges, App Store featured banner + install card grid. v1.0.12: Create Project wizard — New folder button in custom folder browser. v1.0.11: Modals close only via X/Cancel.
changelog_vi: v1.0.13: Bo cuc Desktop UI: sidebar chrome kieu NAS/ADM, wallpaper launcher, System Monitor gauge 2x2, App Store banner + luoi the Install. v1.0.12: Wizard Tao Project — nut Tao thu muc moi trong trinh duyet thu muc tuy chinh. v1.0.11: Modal chi dong bang X/Huy.

name: Download Manager
description: Web download manager: direct links, Google Drive/folders, custom file-hosting (curl/API), BitTorrent via aria2, watched torrent folder, speed limits, and Google OAuth. Now supports yt-dlp.
changelog_en: v0.2.15: Mobile classic drawer sidebar (ModuleSidebarLayout). v0.2.14: Fix frontend build — remove stray in settings WindowModal (esbuild tag mismatch on install). v0.2.13: Wave C Desktop UI, ModuleViewport fix.
changelog_vi: v0.2.15: Sidebar drawer tren mobile classic (ModuleSidebarLayout). v0.2.14: Sua loi build frontend — xoa thua trong settings WindowModal (loi esbuild khi cai). v0.2.13: Wave C Desktop UI, sua ModuleViewport.

name: Audio Player
description: CoPanel music library: configurable folders (/home/music default), folder browse, metadata scan, album/artist/genre views, playlists, cover art, and HTML5 streaming playback.
changelog_en: v0.3.8: Mobile classic drawer sidebar (ModuleSidebarLayout). v0.3.7: Background playback when minimized (keep-running policy); taskbar play/pause indicator with track name and animated badge. v0.3.6: Accept both ?access_token= and legacy ?token= on audio/cover links; enforce audio_station module permission on media routes to fix 401s after auth hardening. Wave C Desktop UI: windowMode, WindowModal overlays, viewport height fixes — Classic + Desktop from one ZIP.
changelog_vi: v0.3.8: Sidebar drawer tren mobile classic (ModuleSidebarLayout). v0.3.7: Phat nhac nen khi minimize (keep-running policy); hien icon play/pause va ten bai tren taskbar kem animation. v0.3.6: Ho tro ca ?access_token= va ?token= cu cho link audio/cover; bo sung kiem tra quyen audio_station cho media routes de sua loi 401 sau khi siet auth. Wave C Desktop UI: windowMode, WindowModal, sua chieu cao viewport — mot ZIP cho Classic va Desktop.

name: SSL Manager
description: Generate Let's Encrypt certificates automatically.
changelog_en: v1.1.2: Fix nginx SSL vhost path — resolve {domain}.conf correctly when applying Let's Encrypt certificates (previously silent no-op). v1.1.1: Desktop UI layout: shared NAS/ADM chrome sidebars, soft launcher wallpaper, System Monitor 2x2 gauges, App Store featured banner + install card grid. v1.1.0: Desktop sidebar UI (certificates, issue LE, custom SSL, auto-renew tab). Auto-renew toggle with daily cron schedule via CoPanel; per-domain renew fix; days_left on certificate list; renew-all from UI.
changelog_vi: v1.1.2: Sua duong dan vhost SSL nginx — tim dung file {domain}.conf khi ap dung chung chi Let's Encrypt (truoc do that bai im lang). v1.1.1: Bo cuc Desktop UI: sidebar chrome kieu NAS/ADM, wallpaper launcher, System Monitor gauge 2x2, App Store banner + luoi the Install. v1.1.0: Giao dien Desktop sidebar (chung chi, cap LE, SSL tuy chinh, tab tu gia han). Bat/tat tu gia han voi lich cron hang ngay qua CoPanel; sua gia han tung domain; hien so ngay con lai; gia han tat ca tu UI.

name: Terminal
description: Execute system commands securely in the browser.
changelog_en: v1.0.7: Fix auth-hardened terminal WebSocket — remove router-level module dependency from /ws handshake and keep explicit access_token/module check inside the WebSocket handler. v1.0.6: Desktop UI sidebar shell redesign — compact header, terminal + snippets split pane with flex h-full scroll, useIsWindowedModule. One ZIP for Classic and Desktop floating windows.
changelog_vi: v1.0.7: Sua WebSocket Terminal sau khi siet auth — bo router-level module dependency khoi /ws handshake va giu kiem tra access_token/quyen module ben trong WebSocket handler. v1.0.6: Thiet ke lai giao dien Desktop — header gon, terminal + snippet chia panel flex h-full, useIsWindowedModule. Mot ZIP cho Classic va Desktop.

name: Rsync Manager
description: SSH compatibility checks and rsync sync to a new VPS (CoPanel/web files). Optional; not core. SQL and Docker are manual.
changelog_en: v1.0.0: Initial AppStore module — POST /compatibility (arch, OS, rsync, optional disk vs estimate), POST /sync (dry-run or real), presets for CoPanel tree excludes.
changelog_vi: v1.0.0: Phien ban dau — API kiem tra tuong thich SSH, sync rsync (dry-run hoac that), preset loai tru cho cay CoPanel.

name: Cloud Sync
description: Google Drive sync with one‑click OAuth popup, account sidebar, and folder sync tasks. One-time Google API setup when the panel has no OAuth credentials.
changelog_en: v1.1.6: Mobile classic drawer sidebar (ModuleSidebarLayout). v1.1.5: Fix 503 on /oauth/google/connect when panel OAuth is missing — one-time Client ID/Secret setup in Cloud Sync UI, then Connect stays one-click popup. GET/POST /oauth/google/config. v1.1.4: SQLite schema init on every request.
changelog_vi: v1.1.6: Sidebar drawer tren mobile classic (ModuleSidebarLayout). v1.1.5: Sua 503 tren /oauth/google/connect khi chua co OAuth tren panel — cau hinh Client ID/Secret mot lan trong Cloud Sync, sau do Connect van mo popup. GET/POST /oauth/google/config. v1.1.4: Khoi tao SQLite moi request.

name: Backup Manager
description: Zero-CLI cloud backup manager powered by rclone. Desktop sidebar shell (Profiles / Remotes / Cloud Setup) for Classic + Desktop UI. Guided Google OAuth, cron scheduling, real-time sync, live progress streaming.
changelog_en: v1.2.15: Fix duplicate i18n key cloudSetup in backup_manager (esbuild warning). v1.2.14: Desktop UI layout: shared NAS/ADM chrome sidebars, soft launcher wallpaper, System Monitor 2x2 gauges, App Store featured banner + install card grid. v1.2.13: Desktop sidebar shell — Profiles, Cloud Remotes, and Cloud Setup tabs; useIsWindowedModule layout; Cloud Setup moved from modal to sidebar panel. One ZIP for Classic + Desktop UI.
changelog_vi: v1.2.15: Sua key i18n cloudSetup trung trong backup_manager (canh bao esbuild). v1.2.14: Bo cuc Desktop UI: sidebar chrome kieu NAS/ADM, wallpaper launcher, System Monitor gauge 2x2, App Store banner + luoi the Install. v1.2.13: Giao dien sidebar Desktop — tab Cau hinh, Cloud Remotes, Cloud Setup; layout useIsWindowedModule; Cloud Setup chuyen tu modal sang panel sidebar. Mot ZIP cho Classic + Desktop.

name: System Monitor
description: Real-time visibility into CPU, memory, and disk usage.
changelog_en: v1.1.7: Desktop UI layout: shared NAS/ADM chrome sidebars, soft launcher wallpaper, System Monitor 2x2 gauges, App Store featured banner + install card grid. v1.1.6: Desktop UI sidebar shell redesign — sidebar nav (Resources / Processes / PM2), compact header, flex scroll layout for Classic + Desktop windows, useIsWindowedModule. v1.1.2: Richer system header — CPU model, architecture, total RAM, aggregated disk totals.
changelog_vi: v1.1.7: Bo cuc Desktop UI: sidebar chrome kieu NAS/ADM, wallpaper launcher, System Monitor gauge 2x2, App Store banner + luoi the Install. v1.1.6: Thiet ke lai giao dien Desktop sidebar — dieu huong Resources/Tien trinh/PM2, header gon, layout flex scroll cho Classic va Desktop, useIsWindowedModule. v1.1.2: Thong tin he thong day du hon.

name: Storage Manager
description: Monitor disks and SMART health — Desktop UI shell with sidebar nav, GParted-style partition wizard, operation queue, drag resize/shrink, LVM, RAID, benchmarks.
changelog_en: v1.6.2: Mobile classic drawer sidebar (ModuleSidebarLayout). v1.6.1: Fix frontend build — rename storage UI tokens to avoid clash with shell theme. v1.6.0: Desktop UI redesign — macOS/Deepin app shell with sidebar nav.
changelog_vi: v1.6.2: Sidebar drawer tren mobile classic (ModuleSidebarLayout). v1.6.1: Sua loi build frontend — doi ten token UI tranh trung shell theme. v1.6.0: Thiet ke lai Desktop UI — shell macOS/Deepin voi sidebar.

name: ClamAV
description: Antivirus dashboard for signature updates, targeted malware scans, detections, and quarantine workflow.
changelog_en: Wave C Desktop UI: windowMode, WindowModal overlays, viewport height fixes — Classic + Desktop from one ZIP. Dual UI: ModuleViewport + useAppShellContext — one ZIP for Classic sidebar and Desktop shell. v1.0.3: When clamav-freshclam service is active, restart service only (never spawn a second freshclam). Fallback JobCancelled import for older CoPanel core.
changelog_vi: Wave C Desktop UI: windowMode, WindowModal, sua chieu cao viewport — mot ZIP cho Classic va Desktop. Giao dien song song: ModuleViewport + useAppShellContext — mot ZIP cho Classic va Desktop. v1.0.3: Khi clamav-freshclam dang chay chi restart service (khong goi freshclam thu hai). Fallback import JobCancelled neu core CoPanel cu.

name: Firewall
description: Visual dashboard for UFW firewall rules and Fail2Ban IDS with correct jail / banned-IP display.
changelog_en: v1.0.8: Desktop UI sidebar shell redesign — UFW/Fail2Ban sidebar nav, compact header with status controls, WindowModal confirmations, en/vi i18n. One ZIP for Classic and Desktop.
changelog_vi: v1.0.8: Thiet ke lai giao dien Desktop sidebar — dieu huong UFW/Fail2Ban, header gon, WindowModal, i18n en/vi. Mot ZIP cho Classic va Desktop.

name: DNS Manager
description: Manage DNS zones and records using local storage or BIND backend.
changelog_en: v1.0.4: Desktop UI sidebar shell redesign — zone sidebar, flex scroll layout, WindowModal delete confirmations, en/vi i18n. One ZIP for Classic sidebar and Desktop floating windows.
changelog_vi: v1.0.4: Thiet ke lai giao dien Desktop sidebar — danh sach zone ben trai, layout flex scroll, WindowModal xac nhan xoa, i18n en/vi. Mot ZIP cho Classic va Desktop.

name: Cloudflare DDNS
description: Dynamic DNS updates to Cloudflare, DNS record management via API, and Cloudflare Tunnel (cloudflared) configuration.
changelog_en: v1.0.13: Fix tunnels API 400 — auto-detect account_id from accounts/zones, stop wiping account_id on empty save, map Cloudflare API errors to 502 with Tunnel permission hints, sync Account ID in UI after verify. v1.0.12: Mobile classic drawer sidebar (ModuleSidebarLayout). v1.0.11: Dual UI redesign — sidebar navigation, flex scroll layout for Desktop/Classic, WindowModal delete confirmations, en/vi i18n.
changelog_vi: v1.0.13: Sua loi API tunnels 400 — tu dong nhan account_id tu accounts/zones, khong xoa account_id khi save rong, map loi Cloudflare API sang 502 kem goi y quyen Tunnel, dong bo Account ID tren UI sau verify. v1.0.12: Sidebar drawer tren mobile classic (ModuleSidebarLayout). v1.0.11: Thiet ke lai giao dien song song WebUI/Desktop — sidebar, layout flex scroll, WindowModal xac nhan xoa, i18n en/vi.

name: WebDAV SMB
description: WebDAV and SMB file sharing on server IP:port. Login with the same username/password as the panel root (superadmin) account. Optional WebDAV root mount for http://IP:port/ without share path.
changelog_en: Wave C Desktop UI: windowMode, WindowModal overlays, viewport height fixes — Classic + Desktop from one ZIP. Dual UI: ModuleViewport + useAppShellContext — one ZIP for Classic sidebar and Desktop shell. v1.0.8: Fix frontend build — restore missing smbPassword state used for SMB password sync. v1.0.7: Show module version and warn when backend too old to save root mount. v1.0.6: Optional WebDAV root mount at http://IP:port/.
changelog_vi: Wave C Desktop UI: windowMode, WindowModal, sua chieu cao viewport — mot ZIP cho Classic va Desktop. Giao dien song song: ModuleViewport + useAppShellContext — mot ZIP cho Classic va Desktop. v1.0.8: Sua loi build frontend — khoi phuc state smbPassword cho dong bo mat khau SMB. v1.0.7: Hien phien ban module, canh bao backend cu khong luu root mount. v1.0.6: WebDAV root mount tai http://IP:port/.

name: Cron Manager
description: Manage recurring task schedules with visual cron builder and command execution.
changelog_en: v1.0.9: Desktop UI sidebar shell redesign — Create Job / Jobs sidebar nav, visual cron builder, WindowModal delete confirmations, en/vi i18n. One ZIP for Classic and Desktop.
changelog_vi: v1.0.9: Thiet ke lai giao dien Desktop sidebar — tab Tao Job/Danh sach, cron builder, WindowModal, i18n en/vi. Mot ZIP cho Classic va Desktop.

name: Package Manager
description: Install and control Ubuntu system packages, runtimes, and tools — including Node.js and PM2.
changelog_en: v1.0.4: Add dedicated PM2 package (npm global install/stop/restart/remove); rename Node.js package; dual-UI polish — search, status filters, compact Desktop window header, mobile drawer + sticky toolbar. v1.0.2: Real install/start/stop/restart/remove via package manager and systemctl; phpMyAdmin access path/open button.
changelog_vi: v1.0.4: Them goi PM2 rieng (cai npm global, stop/restart/remove); doi ten goi Node.js; toi uu UI dual — tim kiem, loc trang thai, header Desktop gon, drawer mobile + thanh cong cu sticky. v1.0.2: Thuc thi that install/start/stop/restart/remove; nut mo phpMyAdmin.

name: AppStore Manager
description: Add, remove, and upgrade third-party modules seamlessly.
changelog_en: v1.0.35: Desktop UI layout: shared NAS/ADM chrome sidebars, soft launcher wallpaper, System Monitor 2x2 gauges, App Store featured banner + install card grid. v1.0.34: Batch update all — install multiple modules with one npm build at the end instead of per-module rebuilds. v1.0.33: Smarter post-install restart — extension-only skips restart; backend hot-reload when possible; auto systemd restart for new modules.
changelog_vi: v1.0.35: Bo cuc Desktop UI: sidebar chrome kieu NAS/ADM, wallpaper launcher, System Monitor gauge 2x2, App Store banner + luoi the Install. v1.0.34: Cap nhat hang loat — cai nhieu module, chi chay npm build mot lan o cuoi thay vi build tung module. v1.0.33: Restart sau cai thong minh hon — extension-only khong restart; hot-reload backend khi duoc; tu restart systemd cho module moi.

name: System Cleaner
description: System Junk cleaner and Disk Analyzer (TreeSize clone) for optimizing storage.
changelog_en: v1.0.4: Desktop UI sidebar shell redesign — sidebar nav (Junk / Disk / Large Files), flex scroll layout, WindowModal confirmations, en/vi i18n. One ZIP for Classic and Desktop.
changelog_vi: v1.0.4: Thiet ke lai giao dien Desktop sidebar — dieu huong Junk/Phan tich o dia/File lon, layout flex scroll, WindowModal xac nhan, i18n en/vi. Mot ZIP cho Classic va Desktop.

name: Web Browser
description: Remote headless Chromium on the VPS to browse LAN-only services (router UI, internal webapps) from the panel. Superadmin only.
changelog_en: Wave C Desktop UI: windowMode, WindowModal overlays, viewport height fixes — Classic + Desktop from one ZIP. Dual UI: ModuleViewport + useAppShellContext — one ZIP for Classic sidebar and Desktop shell. v1.0.5: Fix TypeScript build (boolean disabled props on toolbar buttons). v1.0.4: Custom native <select> dropdown picker. v1.0.3: Fix click and keyboard input. v1.0.2: Detect browser on disk. v1.0.1: Resilient Chromium install. v1.0.0: First release.
changelog_vi: Wave C Desktop UI: windowMode, WindowModal, sua chieu cao viewport — mot ZIP cho Classic va Desktop. Giao dien song song: ModuleViewport + useAppShellContext — mot ZIP cho Classic va Desktop. v1.0.5: Sua loi build TypeScript (thuoc tinh disabled boolean tren nut toolbar). v1.0.4: Menu <select> tuy bien. v1.0.3: Sua click va go phim. v1.0.2: Nhan dien binary. v1.0.1: Cai Chromium on dinh. v1.0.0: Phat hanh dau.

name: Redis Cache Manager
description: Monitor Redis cache, memory usage, and connection status. Pilot: fast extension install (no full panel npm rebuild).
changelog_en: Wave C Desktop UI: windowMode, WindowModal overlays, viewport height fixes — Classic + Desktop from one ZIP. v1.0.0: First release. Pre-built extension/ in ZIP — AppStore install skips npm run build when panel has appstore_manager >= 1.0.32.
changelog_vi: Wave C Desktop UI: windowMode, WindowModal, sua chieu cao viewport — mot ZIP cho Classic va Desktop. v1.0.0: Phat hanh dau. ZIP co extension/ san — cai AppStore bo qua npm run build khi panel da co appstore_manager >= 1.0.32.
